SEARCH

Uses of Class
io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config

Packages that use FileQueue.Config
Package
Description
io.stimulustech.filequeue
FileQueue offers a lightweight, high-performance, simple, reliable, and persistent queue for Java applications.

  • Uses of FileQueue.Config in io.stimulustech.filequeue

    Methods in io.stimulustech.filequeue that return FileQueue.Config
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T extends FileQueueItem>
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    FileQueue.config(String queueName, Path queuePath, Class<T> type, Consumer<? super T> consumer, ExecutorService executorService)
    Creates a FileQueue.Config with all mandatory fields set, ready for further customisation via its fluent setter methods.
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    FileQueue.Config.consumer(Consumer<? super T> consumer)
    Sets the consumer callback that processes items dequeued from the queue.
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    FileQueue.Config.expiration(Expiration<T> expiration)
    Sets the expiration handler invoked when an item exceeds the maximum number of delivery attempts.
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    FileQueue.getConfig()
    Returns the active queue configuration.
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    FileQueue.Config.maxQueueSize(int maxQueueSize)
    Sets the maximum number of items the queue will hold before blocking.
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    FileQueue.Config.maxRetryDelay(int maxRetryDelay)
    Sets the maximum delay between retries when exponential back-off is enabled, expressed in retryDelayUnit(TimeUnit).
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    FileQueue.Config.maxTries(int maxTries)
    Sets the maximum number of delivery attempts before an item is considered expired.
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    FileQueue.Config.persistRetryDelay(int persistRetryDelay)
    Sets the interval at which items persisted to disk are re-examined for reprocessing, expressed in persistRetryDelayUnit(TimeUnit).
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    FileQueue.Config.persistRetryDelayUnit(TimeUnit persistRetryDelayUnit)
    Sets the time unit for persistRetryDelay(int).
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    FileQueue.Config.queueName(String queueName)
    Sets a human-readable name for the queue.
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    FileQueue.Config.queuePath(Path queuePath)
    Sets the path to the queue database directory.
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    FileQueue.Config.retryDelay(int retryDelay)
    Sets the fixed delay between delivery attempts, expressed in retryDelayUnit(TimeUnit).
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    FileQueue.Config.retryDelayAlgorithm(QueueProcessor.RetryDelayAlgorithm retryDelayAlgorithm)
    Sets the retry delay algorithm.
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    FileQueue.Config.retryDelayUnit(TimeUnit retryDelayUnit)
    Sets the time unit for retryDelay(int) and maxRetryDelay(int).
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    FileQueue.Config.type(Type type)
    Sets the concrete FileQueueItem subclass stored by this queue.
    Methods in io.stimulustech.filequeue with parameters of type FileQueue.Config
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    FileQueue.startQueue(FileQueue.Config<T> config)
    Starts the queue engine using the supplied configuration.
